욥기 23:2.content: “Even today my complaint is rebellious. His hand is heavy in spite of my groaning.

욥기 23:3.content: Oh that I knew where I might find him! That I might come even to his seat!

욥기 23:4.content: I would set my cause in order before him, and fill my mouth with arguments.

욥기 23:5.content: I would know the words which he would answer me, and understand what he would tell me.

욥기 23:6.content: Would he contend with me in the greatness of his power? No, but he would listen to me.

욥기 23:7.content: There the upright might reason with him, so I should be delivered forever from my judge.

욥기 23:8.content: “If I go east, he is not there; if west, I can’t find him;

욥기 23:9.content: He works to the north, but I can’t see him. He turns south, but I can’t catch a glimpse of him.

욥기 23:10.content: But he knows the way that I take. When he has tried me, I will come out like gold.

욥기 23:11.content: My foot has held fast to his steps. I have kept his way, and not turned away.

욥기 23:12.content: I haven’t gone back from the commandment of his lips. I have treasured up the words of his mouth more than my necessary food.

욥기 23:13.content: But he stands alone, and who can oppose him? What his soul desires, even that he does.

욥기 23:14.content: For he performs that which is appointed for me. Many such things are with him.

욥기 23:15.content: Therefore I am terrified at his presence. When I consider, I am afraid of him.

욥기 23:16.content: For God has made my heart faint. The Almighty has terrified me.

욥기 23:17.content: Because I was not cut off before the darkness, neither did he cover the thick darkness from my face.
